overall.description: Game footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing the player character approaching the Fat Lady portrait in a castle corridor, entering the Gryffindor common room through the magical painting, and exploring the warm, firelit interior with stone architecture, tapestries, and students relaxing in armchairs.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the stone corridor toward the large portrait at the end

entered.detail: large ornate framed portrait of a woman in a pink dress with an elaborate gold frame
tall gothic window letting in natural light
dark wood paneling covering the lower walls of the corridor
ornate black metal lantern mounted on the wall
smaller framed artwork on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow castle corridor with dark wood paneling and stone floors, approaching a large ornate portrait of the Fat Lady in a pink dress. Natural light filters in from a gothic window on the left as the camera steadily advances toward the painting.

events.description: the Fat Lady portrait swings open revealing a circular passage into the common room
entering the larger common room space with warmer ambient lighting from lamps and fireplace

agents.ego_description: passing through the opened portrait frame into the Gryffindor common room

notable_agents.action: students standing and conversing near the entrance to the common room

entered.detail: stone circular doorway frame of the portrait entrance
spacious common room with high ceilings and red carpets
ornate red and gold patterned carpet covering the floor
wooden stand with hanging robes and coats

segments.scene_description: The portrait swings open to reveal a circular stone passage leading into the Gryffindor common room. The camera walks through the portal into a spacious, warmly lit room with red carpets and high ceilings, where a few students stand conversing near the entrance.

events.description: the large stone fireplace ignites with bright orange flames

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the large stone fireplace as the fire magically ignites

notable_agents.action: student sitting in a leather armchair reading a book near the fireplace

entered.detail: massive carved stone fireplace with intricate gothic details
stone carved crest with lion emblem above the fireplace
vertical house banners hanging on either side of the crest
dark leather upholstered armchairs arranged around the fireplace
brass floor lamp with a white glass shade

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on the massive stone fireplace at the center of the room, featuring the Gryffindor crest and red-gold banners. At 24 seconds, the fireplace magically ignites with bright flames, illuminating the leather armchairs and brass lamps arranged around it, while a student reads nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room seating area with tall windows

events.description: camera begins panning left to reveal more of the common room interior

agents.ego_description: panning left to observe students relaxing and studying in the common room

notable_agents.action: student sitting on a red sofa reading a book
group of students conversing near the tall windows

entered.detail: plush red upholstered sofa with wooden trim
tall gothic arched windows letting in morning light
decorative woven tapestry hanging on the stone wall
dark wood cabinet with glass doors

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left across the common room, moving away from the fireplace to reveal a cozy seating area with a red sofa where students sit reading. Tall gothic windows illuminate the space with natural light, and decorative tapestries adorn the stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room study area with tables

events.description: transition to a different area of the common room showing the study tables

agents.ego_description: observing the study area with wooden tables and green lamps where students gather

notable_agents.action: students gathered and studying near the far windows

entered.detail: large wooden study table with papers and books
classic green glass banker's lamp on the table
dark leather sofa with button tufting
iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the vaulted ceiling
tall arched windows with stone tracery

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to another area of the common room featuring wooden study tables with green banker's lamps and leather sofas. An iron chandelier hangs from the vaulted wooden ceiling, and students can be seen studying near the tall arched windows in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, narrow castle corridor into the expansive and warmly lit interior of the Gryffindor common room. It begins by advancing through a wood-paneled hallway toward an ornate portrait of the Fat Lady, moving past a gothic window as the painting swings open to reveal a circular stone passage. As the camera crosses this threshold, the scene expands into a spacious room filled with red carpets and conversing students before drawing closer to a massive stone fireplace that magically ignites with bright flames. The view then pans left, shifting from the glow of the hearth to a cozy seating area with red sofas and decorative tapestries under the light of tall gothic windows. Finally, the camera glides toward a study area featuring wooden tables with green banker's lamps and leather sofas beneath a vaulted wooden ceiling and a hanging iron chandelier.
